subject: Fix mobile tooltip accessibility and close functionality
body:
- Fix modal close: Replace inline onclick with proper event listeners
  (inline handlers don't work with ES6 module scope)
- Increase touch targets: Help icons now meet iOS 44x44px minimum
  using invisible ::before pseudo-elements
- Improve close button: 44x44px touch target with hover state
- Add modal scrolling: max-h-[90vh] with overflow-y-auto for long content
- Increase help icon visibility: Slightly larger (18px vs 16px) with
  better contrast background
- Mobile-specific sizing: Larger icons and buttons on smaller screens
title: Fix mobile tooltip accessibility and close functionality
